title: Community Moderation Update: April 29, 2026
body:
Today we took action against two high-severity abusive users:
1. spam_wave_42 was banned for posting phishing links across multiple channels
2. toxic_runner was banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers
A false positive report against core_maintainer was also closed after verification. We continue to prioritize community safety and will take swift action against rule violations.
